/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_cli.dir/test_cli.c.o CMakeFiles/test_cli.dir/__/src/cli/dispatch.c.o CMakeFiles/test_cli.dir/__/src/cli/cmd_bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/test_cli.dir/__/src/cli/cmd_test.c.o CMakeFiles/test_cli.dir/__/src/cli/cmd_lang.c.o CMakeFiles/test_cli.dir/__/src/cli/cmd_man.c.o CMakeFiles/test_cli.dir/__/src/cli/cmd_doctor.c.o CMakeFiles/test_cli.dir/__/src/cli/cmd_raf.c.o CMakeFiles/test_cli.dir/__/src/cli/cmd_compile.c.o CMakeFiles/test_cli.dir/__/src/cli/cmd_tokenize.c.o CMakeFiles/test_cli.dir/__/src/cli/cmd_parse.c.o CMakeFiles/test_cli.dir/__/src/cli/cmd_emit.c.o -o ../bin/test_cli  ../librift.a
